privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env qth_relocation_migration task. Confirmed that the baseline Pittsburgh configuration and the target Denver parameters (Lat: 39.7392, Lon: -104.9903, WX: KDEN, Alt: 1609) represent authentic real-world coordinates and weather station codes explicitly stated in the prompt, with the initial state injected via synthetically generated config files in `setup_task.sh`. Additionally, verified that the 5 amateur satellites (ISS, AO-7, SO-50, AO-85, AO-91) and 3 weather satellites (NOAA 15, 18, 19) accurately reflect their real-world NORAD catalog IDs as instructed. Furthermore, discovered that the task is critically defective because `verifier.py` is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task completely unscorable.
